programme.desc: A new king rises in the north; a Khaleesi finds new hope in the season finale.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion arrives in King's Landing to counsel Joffrey; Stannis Baratheon plots an invasion to claim his late brother's throne; Daenerys and her three dragons search for allies and water; Bran presides over a threadbare Winterfell.
